notes: Updated 2026-04-11: added min_expected_value=1.5. Previous: required_third_lane=0 + min_top_win=0.65 (adopted 2026-04-06). EV filter reduces bet count (207→116 in 30d) while improving 30d ROI from 0.360 to 0.816. Single-day ROI improved from 3.229 to 6.4 (8 bets, 1 hit, 12.5% hit rate). T01(min_ev=1.2) and T05(min_top=0.68+min_ev=1.5) also eligible but T02 had best 30d ROI. Monitor for stability — if confirmed over next 1-2 days consider permanent config change.
